query:
SELECT
                    f.slug       AS facet_slug,
                    f.label      AS facet_label,
                    f.sort_order AS facet_sort_order,
                    t.slug       AS tag_slug,
                    t.label      AS tag_label,
                    t.sort_order AS tag_sort_order
                FROM tags t
                JOIN facets f ON f.id = t.facet_id
                ORDER BY f.sort_order, t.sort_order
